title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Melorra

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Melorra
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Category Manager with drive and ambition, Melorra in Tiruchirappalli is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Melorra:
Melorra is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Melorra!
